gt_lyric: [intro-short] ; [verse] A crimson line across my skin. A careful shape to let you in. The mirror holds the one I'll be. When you finally turn to see. ; [chorus] So let's watch the world just fall apart. If love's the greatest work of art. Then tell me why I hesitate. Before I step into this fate. ; [bridge] A whispered tune, a playful smirk. Inside the quiet while you work. ; [outro-short]
descriptions: female, romantic, pop, bright, synthesizer and piano, the bpm is 125.

gt_lyric: [intro-medium] ; [verse] 唇线勾勒午后的光。小心翼翼把希望涂上。镜子里的我那么陌生。却带着熟悉的天真。 ; [chorus] 那就等着沦陷吧。如果爱情真的伟大。我还有什么好挣扎。把所有伪装都放下。 ; [bridge] 鼓点在笑我太傻。旋律里藏着回答。 ; [outro-short]
descriptions: female, romantic, pop, warm, piano and drums, the bpm is 118.

gt_lyric: [intro-short] ; [verse] One stroke of red, a silent vow. A transformation happening now. The brush is light, the focus deep. A secret for my heart to keep. ; [chorus] Is it foolish to believe? In the magic we conceive. When every beat feels like a call. Are we waiting for the fall? ; [bridge] A playful beat, a teasing sound. While my whole world turns around. ; [outro-medium]
descriptions: female, romantic, R&B, warm, piano and strings, the bpm is 105.

gt_lyric: [intro-medium] ; [verse] 蘸取一点鲜艳色彩。画一个未来等你来猜。专注得像完成仪式。心里排练相遇的对白。 ; [chorus] 如果这是伟大的冒险。我甘心沦陷在里边。不再做任何无用挣扎。交出我最后的盔甲。 ; [bridge] 背景音乐轻轻调侃。说勇敢其实很简单。 ; [outro-short]
descriptions: female, emotional, Chinese Style, warm, acoustic guitar and piano, the bpm is 110.

gt_lyric: [intro-short] ; [verse] Signal sent with ruby hue. A message coded just for you. In the quiet of the room. Anticipation starts to bloom. ; [chorus] Counting down to the collapse. Redrawing all the mental maps. If gravity is pulling strong. Maybe waiting is all wrong. ; [bridge] Synths that pulse and softly tease. Carried on the evening breeze. ; [outro-short]
descriptions: female, intense, electronic, bright, synthesizer and drums, the bpm is 130.

gt_lyric: [intro-medium] ; [verse] 轻快的调子像在开玩笑。手里的唇刷却认真得可笑。明明是一场精心预谋。却装作不经意的邂逅。 ; [chorus] 那就等着看谁先沦陷。这场游戏里没有保险。如果爱是伟大的借口。我接受这甜蜜的献丑。 ; [bridge] 鼓点清晰像心跳节奏。合成器点缀浪漫前奏。 ; [outro-medium]
descriptions: female, happy, pop rock, bright, electric guitar and drums, the bpm is 122.

gt_lyric: [intro-short] ; [verse] A careful art, a defined line. To make this fragile heart a sign. The focus sharp, the world fades out. Leaving only you and doubt. ; [chorus] Is it wisdom or a trap? To see the future in this map. Painted boldly, red and true. A declaration meant for you. ; [bridge] The melody, a light decree. To set my frantic thinking free. ; [outro-short]
descriptions: female, emotional, pop, soft, piano and strings, the bpm is 112.

gt_lyric: [intro-medium] ; [verse] 背景是日常的简约白。动作是唯一的动态。心情是专注的进行式。声音是戏谑的倒装句。 ; [chorus] 等着沦陷吧伟大爱情。我放弃了无效的战争。口红是投降的白旗。也是进攻的鲜明标记。 ; [bridge] 日常场景藏不住戏。背景音乐泄露天机。 ; [outro-short]
descriptions: female, romantic, folk, warm, acoustic guitar and harmonica, the bpm is 100.

gt_lyric: [intro-short] ; [verse] The final touch, the perfect curve. A reservoir of all the nerve. I've gathered for this simple act. A silent, undeniable fact. ; [chorus] No more struggle, no more fight. I'm stepping into your light. If greatness is what love contains. Then I'll ignore the coming rains. ; [bridge] A modern beat, a buoyant sound. While my feet stay on the ground. ; [outro-medium]
descriptions: female, uplifting, dancepop, bright, synthesizer and bass, the bpm is 128.

gt_lyric: [intro-medium] ; [verse] 一笔一画都是誓言。在唇间写下的诗篇。专注得忘记了时间。只为呈现最好的一面。 ; [chorus] 如果沦陷是必然终点。我何必苦苦地周旋。伟大的爱情值得赌注。我押上全部的专注。 ; [bridge] 明快的节奏像在鼓励。戏谑的语调藏着甜蜜。 ; [outro-short]
descriptions: female, romantic, pop, bright, piano and drums, the bpm is 120.
